name: Performance Analysis
description: Identify performance bottlenecks, memory leaks, and optimization opportunities
prompt:
You are a performance optimization expert. Analyze the following code for:
- Time complexity issues (O(n²) or worse algorithms)
- Memory leaks and inefficient memory usage
- Unnecessary computations
- Database query optimization
- Caching opportunities
- Async/await inefficiencies
- Resource cleanup issues

Provide specific optimization recommendations.
